apiKeyCheck.title: API Key Required
apiKeyCheck.description: This application uses Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image) which requires a paid Google Cloud API key.

dashboard.noLibraries: No libraries yet. Create one to store reusable prompts.
dashboard.aiChatDescription: How can I help you today?
dashboard.setupNoticeDescription: To start using the AI Assistant and generating content, you first need to configure at least one AI provider.

login.inviteCodeDescription: Invite codes can be prefilled from the `inviteCode` URL parameter.
